content: Good morning! What is on my calendar today?

Good morning Sam! You have 2 events today:
- 10:00am Standup
- 2:00pm Dentist
Thanks, remind me at 1:30 about the dentist
Done! I will send you a reminder at 1:30pm about your dentist appointment.
Also draft a message to the team about tomorrow's sprint planning

Here's a draft:

Hey team! Quick reminder that we have sprint planning tomorrow at 10am. Please come prepared with:
- Your completed tasks from this sprint
- Any blockers or carry-overs
- New items for next sprint

See you there!
Perfect, send it to the #general channel
Sent to #general on Telegram. The team will see it shortly.
